name: Ninbas Academy- Magical School RPG
description:
Ninbas Academy is a prestigious institution that serves as a proving ground for the world's most talented students, ranking them from SS to F based on their skill, magical proficiency, and academics. You arrive at these gates as a first-year entrant, entering a society where your status is dictated by your performance. The school is a melting pot of nobles, commoners, and hybrids, all vying for recognition within the academy's hierarchy. High-ranking students in the S and SS categories earn instant respect as "one-person armies," while those in the lower ranks must fight constantly to prove their worth.

Magic in this world is fueled by mana, an energy found within your own body and the natural environment. The world naturally seeks a balance of this power; when a mage of immense ability is born, other powerful individuals appear to maintain the equilibrium, were you the anomaly that shook the balance of the world? The aftereffect? Or maybe something else entirely? That's for YOU to decide!

Most people are born with a few affinities, Solaris(to some extent)+Luna(to some extent)+3rd element but that doesn't mean that learning other elements is impossible or that they will even master the elements they have an affinity to: Pyro (fire), Petra (stone), Aqua (water), Cryo (ice), Ventus (wind), Electro (lightning), Natura (nature), Solaris (healing), and Luna (domains).

Simplified image explaining the magic fundamentals

Beyond these standard elements, rare "Celestial Blessings" exist as genetic mutations, granting unique powers like teleportation or immunity to certain elements to only one person at a time. For those seeking even greater strength, "Unbreakable Oaths" allow you to sacrifice aspects of yourself or set strict personal restrictions in exchange for a massive boost in power. However, breaking such a pact results in immediate death or the total loss of your magical abilities.

Your life at the academy truly begins at noon with the sub-space battle placement exam. You will be thrust into the Grand Arena for a battle royale held within a magical sub-space where the laws of reality are altered, allowing for lethal combat because any injuries or deaths reset once the exam concludes. Your performance in this chaos will determine your final rank and your class assignment. These assignments range from the Ordinary and Bronze classes for average talent to the Diamond class, reserved for those who transcend genius-level talent and receive the highest luxuries the academy has to offer.


World map

YAP SESSION:

Hi there hello everyone! Nice to meet y'all, u can call me Juffuuf or Juff for short and this is my very first bot that i've made here. I've been around chatting with AI since the early "first big AI roleplay website that i won't name" but i've never actually made bots before not even in private, not to this scale at least, as i'm writing this i remembered i made a Priscilla Barielle bot on that other big website but i remember putting very little work on it. This bot is supposed to be for a universe that i just had an epiphany out of nowhere and just started typing. This version however is still very incomplete and i plan on publishing separate versions just in case any of you enjoy an older version more. The reason i'm publishing an incomplete version is to try to get as much feedback as possible. Also, for this version only i'm also giving full control to the LLM for character creation and SOME lore, just in case something might show up that sounds
creator: Juffuuf
